test_name: PPPoE Session Establishment — FTTP NTD VLAN Verification
topology_notes: NTD connected to Calix E7-2 OLT via single-mode fibre. VLAN 2 is the -assigned CVID for 100/20 speed tier. NTD misconfigured with VLAN 10 (previous test artefact).

errors.message: PADI timeout after 30s — no PADO received from OLT
errors.raw: pppoe[1042]: timeout waiting for PADO on eth0.10 (VLAN 10) after 30000ms

errors.message: Tagged frame egressing on VLAN 10; OLT CVP map shows VLAN 2 for this ONT port
errors.raw: vlan[217]: egress cvid=10 ont_port=2/1/3 olt_cvid_map=2 MISMATCH

errors.message: Untagged or mismatched CVID frame dropped at OLT ingress
errors.raw: calix_e7: port 2/1/3 ingress drop cvid=10 policy=cvid_exact_match
